settings.title: Book Your Service
settings.description: Call us, stop by, or use the form below to schedule an appointment.

settings.title: Shop Hours
settings.text:
Monday – Friday: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Saturday: 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

Sunday: Closed

settings.title: Directions
settings.text: Located on Industrial Blvd between Main St and Broadway, one block east of the 101 freeway. Look for the red awning.

settings.question: Do I need an appointment?
settings.answer: Appointments are recommended but not required. Walk-ins are welcome for quick services like oil changes. For diagnostics or larger repairs, booking ahead ensures faster service.

settings.question: Can I drop my car off before you open?
settings.answer: Yes. We have a secure early drop-off area with a key drop box. Leave your keys and a note describing the issue, and we'll contact you once we've had a look.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept cash, all major credit and debit cards, and offer financing options for larger repairs. Fleet accounts can be set up with net-30 terms.

settings.question: Do you offer towing?
settings.answer: We can coordinate towing through our local partners. Call us and we'll arrange a tow directly to our shop.
